description: Use this API to remove an “other” type model attached to a 2-terminal dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = cct2dcomod_remove(dc, model)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line for which model data is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the model to be removed. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no “other” model at this dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
